message:
fix(command): revert FUNCTION reply shape to upstream convention; drop stray test; token

Two FUNCTION-command reply-shape tweaks from a prior session are rolled
back after live-oracle diff against upstream Redis confirmed the
original behaviour was correct:

- function_cmd FUNCTION LIST: the library `engine` field now emits
  `RespFrame::BulkString(Some(lib.engine.as_bytes().to_vec()))` — i.e.
  the engine name exactly as registered (commonly `LUA`) — rather than
  `lib.engine.to_ascii_lowercase().into_bytes()`. Real Redis returns
  the stored casing (uppercase `LUA`) on FUNCTION LIST; the earlier
  lowercasing diverged from upstream and is reverted.

- function_cmd FUNCTION STATS: the `running_script` field is emitted
  as `RespFrame::BulkString(None)` (RESP2 nil) rather than
  `RespFrame::Integer(0)`. Upstream Redis returns nil when no script is
  currently executing — a 0 integer was a misread of the contract. The
  in-module unit test `function_stats_reports_engines` is updated in
  lockstep.

Also removes a stray `test;` token at the end of
crates/fr-command/src/lib.rs that was a partial edit carried over from
a prior session (noted in the earlier revert-explanation commit) and
made the crate fail to compile under `cargo check`. The `#[cfg(test)]
mod zadd_xx_test;` declaration is now the true final line of the file
and the crate parses cleanly again.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6314,7 +6314,7 @@ fn function_cmd(
                 RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"library_name".to_vec())),
                 RespFrame::BulkString(Some(lib.name.as_bytes().to_vec())),
                 RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"engine".to_vec())),
-                RespFrame::BulkString(Some(lib.engine.to_ascii_lowercase().into_bytes())),
+                RespFrame::BulkString(Some(lib.engine.as_bytes().to_vec())),
                 RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"functions".to_vec())),
             ];
             let funcs: Vec<RespFrame> = lib
@@ -6361,7 +6361,7 @@ fn function_cmd(
         let (lib_count, func_count) = store.function_stats();
         Ok(RespFrame::Array(Some(vec![
             RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"running_script".to_vec())),
-            RespFrame::Integer(0),
+            RespFrame::BulkString(None),
             RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"engines".to_vec())),
             RespFrame::Array(Some(vec![
                 RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"LUA".to_vec())),
@@ -30394,7 +30394,7 @@ mod tests {
             stats,
             RespFrame::Array(Some(vec![
                 RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"running_script".to_vec())),
-                RespFrame::Integer(0),
+                RespFrame::BulkString(None),
                 RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"engines".to_vec())),
                 RespFrame::Array(Some(vec![
                     RespFrame::BulkString(Some(b"LUA".to_vec())),
@@ -34991,4 +34991,3 @@ mod tests {
 }
 #[cfg(test)]
 mod zadd_xx_test;
-test;
